Class ExchangeSyncMsg.ExchangeSyncItem

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.gtnet.model.msg.ExchangeSyncMsg.ExchangeSyncItem
Enclosing class:
ExchangeSyncMsg
public static class ExchangeSyncMsg.ExchangeSyncItem extends Object
Single instrument's exchange configuration for sync. For securities, isin and currency are set, toCurrency is null. For currency pairs, isin is null, currency is fromCurrency, and toCurrency is set.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExchangeSyncItem

      public ExchangeSyncItem()

    • ExchangeSyncItem

      public ExchangeSyncItem(String isin, String currency, String toCurrency, boolean lastpriceSend, boolean historicalSend)
      Constructs an exchange sync item.
      Parameters:
      isin - the ISIN for securities, null for currency pairs
      currency - the currency for securities, or fromCurrency for currency pairs
      toCurrency - the toCurrency for currency pairs, null for securities
      lastpriceSend - whether intraday prices are offered
      historicalSend - whether historical prices are offered

  • Method Details

    • forSecurity

      public static ExchangeSyncMsg.ExchangeSyncItem forSecurity(String isin, String currency, boolean lastpriceSend, boolean historicalSend)
      Creates an item for a security.

    • forCurrencypair

      public static ExchangeSyncMsg.ExchangeSyncItem forCurrencypair(String fromCurrency, String toCurrency, boolean lastpriceSend, boolean historicalSend)
      Creates an item for a currency pair.

    • isSecurity

      public boolean isSecurity()
      Checks if this item represents a security.
      Returns:
      true if this is a security (has ISIN)

    • isCurrencypair

      public boolean isCurrencypair()
      Checks if this item represents a currency pair.
      Returns:
      true if this is a currency pair (no ISIN, has toCurrency)

    • getKey

      public String getKey()
      Returns a unique key for this item.
      Returns:
      "ISIN:currency" for securities, "fromCurrency:toCurrency" for currency pairs

    • hasAnySendEnabled

      public boolean hasAnySendEnabled()
      Checks if any send flag is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if lastpriceSend or historicalSend is true
